title: Amtech L2360 10 Piece 50mm non-slip Pozi drive bit set
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: DURABLE: These non-slip 50mm #2 Pozi drive bits are made from strong S2 grade steel for durability
NON-SLIP: With serrated non-slip tips, they are supplied in a handy storage case
PLEASE NOTE: They are not suitable for use with impact drivers or wrenches
ERGONOMIC USE: Built for comfort and ease of handling during long sessions
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 10x Bits See more
